Hi! My name is Anton Jakobsson – I'm a product designer with UI & UX and branding skills who love to build powerful and elegant products with 8 years of experience in the tech industry. I'm currently in collab with Onepropeller as a Lead Digital Designer/fellow human being doing design work at large as a consultant.
